commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the browser CDP proxy bypass source and its unit-test mock from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal` to `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime`.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and the latest release package metadata exclude the private subpath while the browser code imports it, and this PR's target module lacks the named export. I did not run a packaged browser CLI repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is the SDK/security-boundary direction plus contributor-owned real packaged proof, not a safe automated repair.

target.title: fix(plugin-sdk): update ssrf-runtime import path in cdp-proxy-bypass
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The browser plugin fails to load in v2026.6.9 with:

```
Package subpath './plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal' is not defined by "exports"
```

**Root cause**: `extensions/browser/src/browser/cdp-proxy-bypass.ts:12` imports from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal`, but `package.json` exports only `./plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime` and explicitly excludes `dist/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal.js` from the published files.

The neighbouring file `cdp.helpers.ts:8` already uses the correct public path and imports the same export successfully.

## Evidence

### Fix (`extensions/browser/src/browser/cdp-proxy-bypass.ts:12`)

Before:
```ts
import { registerManagedProxyBrowserCdpBypass } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal";
```

After:
```ts
import { registerManagedProxyBrowserCdpBypass } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime";
```

### Test mock (`extensions/browser/src/browser/cdp-proxy-bypass.test.ts:29`)

Updated to match the new import:

Before: `vi.mock("openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal", ...)`
After: `vi.mock("openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime", ...)`

### Consistency proof

| File | Import path | Status |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `cdp.helpers.ts:8` | `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime` | Already correct |
| `cdp-proxy-bypass.ts:12` (before) | `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal` | Stale - not in exports |
| `cdp-proxy-bypass.ts:12` (after) | `openclaw/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime` | Fixed |
| `package.json:496` | `./plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime` | Exported |
| `package.json:62` | `!dist/plugin-sdk/ssrf-runtime-internal.js` | Excluded from publish |

## Test plan
- [x] Source fix: 1-line import path change in `cdp-proxy-bypass.ts`
- [x] Test fix: `vi.mock` path matched to the new import
- [ ] Verify the browser plugin lazy-loads successfully with a clean build

Fixes #96639
